silicon_valley.topic: Agentic AI becomes a product strategy focus
silicon_valley.summary: AI product strategy is shifting from chatbots toward systems that can use tools, plan tasks, and execute multi-step workflows.

silicon_valley.topic: AI safety and transparency rules become operational
silicon_valley.summary: AI governance is moving from broad policy discussion into concrete compliance work for product, legal, and enterprise sales teams.

wall_street_pe.topic: Private capital continues to fund AI infrastructure
wall_street_pe.summary: Large AI investments remain focused on frontier models, deployment services, compute, and enterprise infrastructure.

wall_street_pe.topic: AI stock outlook depends on monetization quality
wall_street_pe.summary: Public-market enthusiasm remains strong, but investors are paying closer attention to revenue quality, margins, and capital expenditure returns.
